ddls:
CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* The name of the MongoDB collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the collection was created */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the collection in bytes */,
  "sharded" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the collection is sharded */,
  "indexes" TEXT /* JSON object containing information about indexes on the collection */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the collection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection being queried */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* JSON formatted string of the query parameters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the query was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the query */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., pending, running, completed, failed) */,
  "last_executed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the query was last executed */,
  "sort_order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sort order used in the query */,
  "collation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collation rules used in the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_sort_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("sort_order_id") REFERENCES sort_orders ("sort_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_collation_id FOREIGN KEY ("collation_id") REFERENCES collations ("collation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the query that was executed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the query */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query in seconds */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the query */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the query execution (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the error log if the query failed */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* JSON formatted string of the query parameters used during execution */,
  "sort_order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sort order used during execution */,
  "collation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collation rules used during execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_collation_id FOREIGN KEY ("collation_id") REFERENCES collations ("collation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_sort_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("sort_order_id") REFERENCES sort_orders ("sort_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_logs_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter being set */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value assigned to the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON specifying permissions granted to this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collations" (
  "collation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collation */,
  "collation_name" TEXT /* Name of the collation rule */,
  "rules" TEXT /* JSON specifying collation rules */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sort_orders" (
  "sort_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sort order */,
  "order_definition" TEXT /* JSON defining sort order for results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sort_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the query if the action is related to a query */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection if the action is related to a collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the query that caused the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurred */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* JSON formatted string of the query parameters that caused the error */,
  "sort_order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sort order used in the query that caused the error */,
  "collation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collation rules used in the query that caused the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_sort_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("sort_order_id") REFERENCES sort_orders ("sort_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_collation_id FOREIGN KEY ("collation_id") REFERENCES collations ("collation_id")
)
